body.title: Rename utility_closet_client.py → adc_client.py
body.result: renamed utility_closet_client.py → adc_client.py; class renamed; server.py updated; test file renamed; 35 tests pass
body.description:
devices/igor/web/utility_closet_client.py is a REST client that Igor uses to register with the ADC web server. The name is stale — it should be adc_client.py since utility_closet_server is now web_server device. The docstring also says 'utility closet client'. web/server.py imports it as `from .utility_closet_client import uc_client`.

**Affected files:** devices/igor/web/utility_closet_client.py (rename to adc_client.py), devices/igor/web/server.py (update import)
**Design rules:** none — rename only
**Scope boundary:** Rename file, update import in server.py, update docstring. No functional changes.
**Test plan:** Igor starts and web UI registers successfully after rename
